creator: thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
text:
The last commit to multimedia/mplayer introduced a split into two ports,
mplayer, the player part and
mencoder, the movie encoder part.

The mencoder front-ends in the ports tree do not yet reflect this change.

Fix: The attached patch glues together several diffs that patch the appropriate changes into the Makefiles of multimedia/
o gmencoder
o iriverter
o iso2mkv
o kino
o kmenc15
o manencode
o ogmrip
o tovid

Patch attached with submission follows:
